checksums_32.description: SHA256 checksums of 32-bit Agentless OnGuard Wrapper EXEs

checksums_64.description: SHA256 checksums of 64-bit Agentless OnGuard Wrapper EXEs

client_os.description: Client OS type. Allowed Values: Windows, macOS and Linux

domain_account.description: Name of domain account used to launch Agentless OnGuard on endpoints

download_url.description: HTTP/HTTPS URL to download Agentless OnGuardWrapper EXE from the Remote File Server (e.g. https://10.20.30.40/agent/AgentlessOnGuard/windows/AgentlessOnGuardWrapper.exe)

id.description: Numeric ID of Agentless OnGuard Setting

servers.description: IP addresses or FQDN of ClearPass servers that Agentless OnGuard should use to read agent settings (e.g. ["hostname.example.com", "1.2.3.4"])

ssh_account.description: Name of ssh account used to launch Agentless OnGuard on endpoints

validate_url_cert.description: Should Agentless OnGuard Launcher validate the Server Certificate of the remote server while downloading Agentless OnGuardWrapper EXE? (default=true)

working_dir.description: Full path of directory on endpoints where all files required to start Agentless OnGuard will be copied (e.g. C:\OnGuard)
